scope_note: QA Phase-Conjugate EEG Brain-State Recall Cert [520]. Primary sources: (Shoeb, 2009) MIT PhD thesis (CHB-MIT Scalp EEG Database); (Goldberger, 2000) DOI 10.1161/01.CIR.101.23.e215 (PhysioNet/PhysioBank); (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118; (Owechko, 1987) IEEE JQE 25(3):619-634. Shoeb A.H. (2009) 'Application of Machine Learning to Epileptic Seizure Onset Detection and Treatment' MIT; Goldberger et al. (2000) Circulation 101(23):e215-e220. CLAIM (empirically demonstrated + mechanism-certified): the QA phase-conjugate associative memory of cert [519] (built on the exact FWM conjugator of cert [518]) performs artifact-robust EEG brain-state recall. A 10s multi-channel EEG window is mapped to a topographic QA phase vector (per-channel z-scored log band-power -> qa_residue in {1,...,m}); train windows are stored, and a corrupted/partial probe is recalled to the nearest stored brain-state. KEY MECHANISM (certified deterministically on synthetic separable patterns in the validator, NO external data): under a global reference-shift artifact (probe -> qa_add(probe, phi), modelling EEG re-referencing / DC offset), NAIVE nearest-overlap classification collapses toward chance as phi grows, while PHASE-LOCKED classification -- scan the global compensation phase psi maximising overlap, read the class in that compensated frame (the [518] phase-conjugate mirror self-locking to the medium) -- stays correct for all phi. EMPIRICAL RECORD (reference impl qa_eeg_phase_conjugate_recall.py, real CHB-MIT data at archive/phase_artifacts/phase2_data/eeg/chbmit, 7 patients chb10/12/15/16/17/21/23, axiom-linter clean): seizure/baseline recall 0.83-1.00 (chance 0.54-0.83); robust to 60% electrode dropout (memory >= direct-NN); under global reference-shift artifact aggregate phase-locked accuracy phi=6 ~0.81 vs naive ~0.40, phi=12 ~0.85 vs naive ~0.44 (per-patient phase-lock 0.72-0.92 vs naive 0.17-0.57). HONEST LIMITS: phase-lock costs a few percent on clean signal (phi=0, the psi-scan can mis-lock); chb16 is class-imbalanced (chance 0.83, uninformative alone); single broadband log-power feature, m=24; 7 patients (five unlocked by fixing an unguarded EDF zero-range-channel division in the project loader). The empirical numbers cannot be recomputed in CI (24GB EEG data is not in the git tree); they are recorded here with provenance and reproduced by the committed script; the VALIDATOR certifies the mechanism synthetically. Checks PLC_MECHANISM/OVERLAP_MATCH/DISTORTION_ARTIFACT/NAIVE_FAILS/EMPIRICAL_WITNESS/A1_RANGE/SRC/F. Builds on certs [518],[519]. Author: Will Dale + Claude 2026-07-08.
